case_title: LARONDA BOLDEN VS. ABDUL S KHAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE OF DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOLDEN, LARONDA
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-20-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-30-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-10-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KHAN, ABDUL S
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BOLDEN, LARONDA AS TO DEFENDANT KHAN, ABDUL S KHAN, SHAMIR A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOLDEN, LARONDA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOLDEN, LARONDA AS TO DEFENDANT KHAN, ABDUL S

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOLDEN, LARONDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KHAN, ABDUL S KHAN, SHAMIR A PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF DEC-01-2015

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE TWO DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHAMIR KHAN WAIVES PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE. EXHIBITS RETAINED FROM BOTH THE PLTF AND THE DEFT. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
